title: Intense Earthy Dutch Vegetable Tagine
description: A hearty and earthy plant-based stew originating from Dutch cuisine, featuring a rich blend of spices and chocolate, cooked to perfection in a terracotta dish. This dish is perfect for a romantic evening or a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large terracotta dish, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the chilli powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped carrots and parsnips, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the dish with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Remove the dish from the oven and stir in the dark chocolate until it is melted and well combined.
Season the tagine with thyme and serve hot.
